title: crataegus polita var. tatnalliana
intro: Crataegus polita var. tatnalliana, also known as Tatnall's hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn tree that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health by lowering blood pressure and improving circulation. The health benefits of Crataegus polita var. tatnalliana include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving exercise tolerance, and lowering cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
